blur_tooltip: Blurred by Rotector. Click to reveal.
custom_api_docs_field_badge_color: (string, optional) Background color (hex, rgb, or named color)
custom_api_docs_field_badges: (array, optional) Custom API extension. Max 3 badge objects displayed in the user tooltip. Each object contains:
custom_api_docs_field_confidence_reason: (number, required) Confidence score for this specific reason between 0.0 and 1.0
custom_api_docs_field_evidence: (array of strings or null) Evidence snippets supporting the reason
custom_api_docs_field_is_locked: (boolean) Whether the account is currently locked
custom_api_docs_field_is_reportable: (boolean) Whether the user can be reported through the extension
custom_api_docs_field_last_updated: (number) Unix timestamp of last analysis in seconds
custom_api_docs_field_reasons: (object) Map of reason category name to detail object. Each entry contains:
custom_api_docs_field_reviewer: (object) Moderator who verified the flag. Include username and displayName. Omit for automated detections.
custom_api_docs_flag_row_description_0: No violations detected. Return this for users not yet analyzed or unknown to your system.
custom_api_docs_flag_row_description_2: Violations manually verified by a human moderator. Primary type for inappropriate users.
custom_api_docs_flag_row_description_3: Submitted for review. Not yet confirmed as inappropriate.
custom_api_docs_flag_row_description_5: Some inappropriate activity observed but evidence is inconclusive.
custom_api_docs_flag_row_description_6: Previously flagged but has since cleared violations.
custom_api_docs_intro: Implement two HTTPS endpoints that return user status in a success/data wrapper. Mirrors the Rotector API user-lookup contract.
custom_api_docs_note_auth_choose: Pick the header format your API expects on the API form. All three are accepted by the Rotector API; third-party APIs typically require one specific format.
custom_api_docs_note_auth_optional: Authentication is optional. Configure an API key on the API form if your endpoint requires one.
custom_api_docs_note_batch_data: The data field is a map keyed by user ID (as a string). Values follow the same schema as single-user responses.
custom_api_docs_note_batch_limit: Recommended maximum of 100 user IDs per batch to balance performance and response time.
custom_api_docs_note_batch_partial: Return only users that exist in your system. Omit unknown users from the map.
custom_api_docs_note_cors: Include Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * (or the extension origin) so the browser can reach your API.
custom_api_docs_note_differences_badges: Badges are a custom API extension. The Rotector API does not return a badges array.
custom_api_docs_note_differences_endpoin: Rotector-only endpoints (groups, Discord user lookup, plaintext, outfit resolution) are not part of the custom API contract. Custom APIs only implement user lookup.
custom_api_docs_note_differences_fields: Rotector-specific optional fields like isReportable, isLocked, and versionCompatibility are surfaced in tooltips only when present. Custom APIs can omit them.
custom_api_docs_note_errors_intro: Return HTTP 200 with a success/error wrapper for all handled errors. Use 4xx/5xx only for unhandled failures.
custom_api_docs_note_flag_type_warning: Only flag types 1 (Flagged) and 2 (Confirmed) should trigger automatic actions. Types 0, 3, and 6 are informational; type 5 requires review.
custom_api_docs_note_flag_types_intro: Six numeric values communicate the analysis outcome. Custom APIs should use the same semantics so tooltips behave consistently.
custom_api_docs_note_http_status: HTTP status 200 signals a handled response. Any other status code is treated as a failure by the extension.
custom_api_docs_note_overview_reference: The Rotector API is itself built on this same contract and is the reference implementation:
custom_api_docs_note_overview_scope: Custom APIs implement two endpoints: a single-user GET and a batch POST. Response bodies always use the success/data wrapper.
custom_api_docs_note_overview_what: The custom API contract lets the extension query a third-party service for user flag status alongside the Rotector system API.
custom_api_docs_note_reason_types_custom: Custom APIs may use any reason-key names. Keys appear in tooltips exactly as returned.
custom_api_docs_note_reason_types_intro: Rotector uses a fixed set of reason category names. Custom APIs may mirror these or use their own.
custom_api_docs_note_url_batch: The batch URL receives POST requests with a JSON body containing an array of user IDs.
custom_api_docs_note_url_overview: A custom API requires two URLs: a single-lookup URL (GET) and a batch URL (POST). Both must be HTTPS.
custom_api_docs_note_url_single: The single-lookup URL must contain a {userId} placeholder that the extension replaces with the target Roblox user ID.
custom_api_docs_note_wrapper: Every response uses '{' "success": true, "data": ... '}' on success or '{' "success": false, "error": "..." '}' on failure.
custom_api_docs_reason_chat_messages: Inappropriate content detected in chat messages
custom_api_docs_reason_friend_network: Connections to known flagged users indicating network participation
custom_api_docs_reason_game_favorites: Favoriting games associated with inappropriate content
custom_api_docs_reason_group_membership: Membership in groups associated with inappropriate activity
custom_api_docs_reason_other: Violations that don't fall into other categories
custom_api_docs_reason_user_profile: Inappropriate content in the user's profile (display name, description, social links)
custom_api_form_alert_url_changed_disabl: API URL changed. The API has been disabled for security. Please enable it again and grant permissions.
custom_api_form_error_image_mime: Invalid image type. MIME type does not match file extension
custom_api_form_error_image_size: Warning: Large file size ({0}KB). Consider using a smaller image to reduce storage usage.
custom_api_form_error_image_type: Invalid file type. Please use PNG, JPG, SVG, or WebP
custom_api_form_error_name_length: Name must be 12 characters or less
custom_api_form_error_timeout_max: Timeout must be 60000ms (60 seconds) or less
custom_api_form_error_timeout_min: Timeout must be at least 1000ms (1 second)
custom_api_form_hint_api_key: Optional. Pick the header format below after entering a key. Leave empty for unauthenticated requests.
custom_api_form_hint_auth_header: Which header the key is sent in. The Rotector API accepts all three; most third-party APIs require one specific format.
custom_api_form_hint_batch_url: Full URL for batch user lookups (POST). Must be HTTPS.
custom_api_form_hint_image: Upload a landscape image for the tooltip tab (PNG, JPG, SVG, WebP). Recommended: 480x160px (3:1 ratio).
custom_api_form_hint_single_url: Full URL for single user lookups (GET). Must be HTTPS and contain {userId} placeholder.
custom_api_import_error_empty_data: Please paste an API configuration or upload a file.
custom_api_import_error_file_read_failed: Failed to read file. Please try again.
custom_api_import_error_invalid_file_ext: Invalid file type. Please select a .rotector-api file.
custom_api_import_placeholder_paste: Paste the exported API configuration string here...
custom_api_mgmt_alert_import_renamed: API imported as "{0}" (renamed from "{1}" because an API with that name already exists)
custom_api_mgmt_alert_permission_denied: Permission denied. The API remains disabled.
custom_api_mgmt_notice_max_reached: Maximum of {0} custom APIs reached. Delete an existing API to add a new one.
custom_api_mgmt_permission_notice_messag: Custom APIs need permission to connect to external websites so they can analyze Roblox users. This allows the extension to send user data to your configured APIs and display their results alongside Rotector's analysis.
custom_api_mgmt_pill_needs_permission_hi: Enable this API to grant browser permission to its origin.
custom_api_mgmt_subtitle: Configure custom analysis endpoints for user lookups.
custom_api_mgmt_test_failed:
Connection failed

API "{0}" is not responding or returned an error.

Please check:
• URL is correct and accessible
• API server is running
• CORS is configured if needed
custom_api_mgmt_test_success:
Connection successful!

API "{0}" is reachable and responding.
developer_logs_clear_confirm: Are you sure you want to clear all logs?
developer_logs_empty_hint: Enable debug logging to capture detailed logs
export_modal_description: Export a list of tracked users in this group that have been flagged, confirmed, or have a mixed status by Rotector.
friend_warning_high_risk_message: Proceeding with this friend request may expose you to inappropriate content or harmful interactions.
group_members_empty_no_tracked: No tracked users found, or this group is too large to track
group_members_hidden: The group owner has disabled the member list for this group. Use the Tracked tab to view flagged members.
group_members_page_jump_confirm: This will make {0} request(s) to reach page {1}. Continue?
group_members_page_jump_switch: Switch to {0}? Only {1} request(s) instead of {2}.
group_members_tracked_description: History of flagged users who joined this group
membership_api_key_description: Paste the membership key generated in the Rotector Discord server.
membership_assignment_description: The donator badge appears on this Roblox profile.
membership_assignment_empty: No Roblox profile is displaying the badge yet.
membership_designs_description: Choose how your badge looks. Each axis can be set independently.
membership_designs_update_failed: Failed to update design. Please try again.
membership_how_description: A membership key unlocks the donator badge and elevated limits. Follow these steps to get one.
membership_modal_assign_body: Enter the Roblox user ID that should display the donator badge.
membership_modal_change_body: Move the donator badge to a different Roblox user.
membership_modal_remove_body: The donator badge will stop appearing on this Roblox profile.
membership_page_subtitle: Tier perks, badge design, and recipient.
membership_step_3: Link your Discord account in your Ko-Fi profile so the tier role is granted.
membership_step_4: Open the #claim-key channel in Discord and generate your API key.
membership_step_5: Paste the key into the field above.
membership_toast_assign_failed: Failed to assign badge. Please try again.
membership_toast_invalid_user_id: Enter a valid Roblox user ID.
onboarding_badge_integration_desc: Number of integrations that flagged this user.
onboarding_badge_queue_desc: User is in the analysis queue.
onboarding_badge_reportable_desc: You can submit a report about this user.
onboarding_close_confirm_message: You haven't finished the setup. You can continue later when you visit Roblox again.
onboarding_feature_queue_desc: Submit suspicious users for automated analysis.
onboarding_feature_tooltips_desc: Get detailed information by hovering over status indicators.
onboarding_feature_voting_desc: Help improve detection by voting on flagged users.
onboarding_features_description: Tools to help keep you safe:
onboarding_finish_feedback: Found a false positive, false negative, bug, or have a feature idea? Let us know in our
onboarding_finish_protection: Roblox may not always protect you from harmful users, but Rotector has your back. We'll help you identify potentially dangerous accounts before you interact with them.
onboarding_language_description: Choose your preferred language and translation settings for the best experience.
onboarding_preset_adult_description: No blur - see full profile information without content being hidden
onboarding_preset_description: Select the preset that's right for you. This controls whether content is blurred.
onboarding_preset_minor_description: Blurs avatars and names on Roblox profiles of users flagged in our system to help protect you
onboarding_preset_notice: You can change this anytime in Settings
onboarding_scope_explanation: We focus specifically on protecting children from predators and sexual content because this represents the most urgent safety concern on Roblox. By staying focused, we can deliver more accurate detection rather than spreading our efforts thin across all content types.
onboarding_status_description: Each user displays a status indicator showing their safety level:
onboarding_status_mixed_desc: Has inappropriate content but insufficient evidence.
onboarding_status_pending_desc: Currently being reviewed by our moderation team.
onboarding_status_unsafe_desc: Flagged for inappropriate content or behavior.
onboarding_translate_description: Automatically translate violation details and reasons to your selected language using Google Translate.
onboarding_welcome_agree_accuracy: I understand that false positives and false negatives can occur, and I will report any issues through website support
onboarding_welcome_agree_responsible_use: I agree to use Rotector responsibly and understand that my access may be revoked if I violate the terms of service or abuse the extension
onboarding_welcome_description: Rotector helps protect you on Roblox by identifying potentially inappropriate users.
outfit_3d_drag_hint: Drag to rotate, scroll to zoom
outfit_snapshot_lightbox_caveat: Captured at analysis time. The user's current outfit may differ.
outfit_viewer_disclaimer: Outfits may have been modified since they were flagged. The current appearance may differ from when the issue was detected.
performance_dashboard_empty_hint: Performance traces appear here during extension use in dev mode
popup_header_description: Real-time safety indicators that warn you about inappropriate Roblox users before you interact with them.
queue_error_modal_failed_message: Failed to queue user ID {0} for review.
queue_error_modal_step1: Check if the user has already been flagged by our system
queue_error_modal_step2: If the error persists, try again in a few minutes
queue_error_modal_step3: If you need support, include the Request ID above
queue_history_empty_hint: Users you queue for review will appear here
queue_notification_safe_message: User {0} scan complete. No issues found.
queue_popup_ack_accuracy: I understand results may not be perfectly accurate and false positives or negatives can occur
queue_popup_ack_all: I acknowledge and agree to all of the below
queue_popup_ack_confidentiality: I will not publicly share, discuss, or coordinate my submissions with others
queue_popup_ack_dynamic_limits: I understand my queue limits increase as my submissions are confirmed accurate
queue_popup_ack_inaccuracy_restriction: I understand that repeatedly submitting innocent users will result in account restrictions
queue_popup_ack_misuse: I understand that misusing this feature may result in restrictions on my account
queue_popup_ack_no_exploit: I am not exploiting weaknesses in the detection system and will report any I discover
queue_popup_ack_no_retaliation: I am not submitting this user out of personal conflict, drama, or retaliation
queue_popup_ack_not_identity: I understand that a user's identity or interests alone are not valid reasons for submission
queue_popup_ack_not_innocent: I have reasonable concern about this user and am not submitting an obviously innocent profile
queue_popup_ack_review_process: I understand results are processed by our system and may be reviewed by moderators
queue_popup_ack_scope: This submission is related to sexual or predatory content concerns only
queue_popup_description_analysis: You are about to submit user (ID: {0}) for analysis by our system.
queue_popup_description_reanalysis: You are about to submit user (ID: {0}) for reanalysis by our system.
queue_popup_friends_check_description: Analyze friend list for flagged or suspicious users.
queue_popup_groups_check_description: Analyze group memberships for inappropriate themes or content.
queue_popup_outfit_none: No outfits found for this user
queue_popup_profile_check_description: Analyze username, display name, and bio for inappropriate content.
queue_success_modal_step1: Our system will analyze this account for patterns of concern
queue_success_modal_step2: If flagged, the user's status will be confirmed within a few minutes
queue_success_modal_step3: Results will be reflected when viewing this user's profile
queue_success_modal_success_message: User ID {0} has been successfully queued for review.
report_helper_account_warning: Reports are filed under your Roblox account.
report_helper_enable_advanced: Enable 'Advanced Violation Details' in settings to auto-fill.
report_helper_filled_error: Auto-fill failed. Text copied to clipboard.
settings_help_advanced_violations: Display detailed violation messages and evidence. May contain mature content.
settings_help_cache_duration: How long to cache user status data (1-10 minutes). Higher values reduce API calls but may show outdated information.
settings_help_cipher_decoding: Automatically decode Caesar cipher, Morse code, and binary found in profile bios and violation evidence.
settings_help_debug_logging: Show detailed logs in the browser console (F12 -> Console) for troubleshooting.
settings_help_developer_mode: Unlock advanced developer settings and API integration management.
settings_help_experimental_custom_apis: Connect third-party content analysis APIs alongside Rotector.
settings_help_language: Auto uses your browser's language setting. Select a specific language to override.
settings_help_theme: Auto follows Roblox's theme setting. Light and Dark override this preference.
settings_help_translate_violations: Automatically translates violation messages to your browser language when viewing tooltips.
tooltip_cross_signal_message: The system was more aggressive in its evaluation because supporting evidence was detected in other areas. Content flagged here may seem borderline on its own.
tooltip_discord_grace_period: Had not passed the grace period when last checked
tooltip_discord_info_first_seen: When the user was first observed in the server
tooltip_discord_info_joined: When the user joined the server
tooltip_discord_info_message: Discord-linked accounts are verified through third-party services with zero false positives.
tooltip_discord_info_updated: When the record was last refreshed
tooltip_discord_joined_description: When this user joined the Discord server
tooltip_discord_seen_description: When this member was first observed in the server
tooltip_discord_tase_description: Tracked by The All Seeing Eye, a partner initiative
tooltip_discord_updated_description: When this record was last refreshed
tooltip_ferns_info_message: The user's account appeared in a data breach of a website that distributed access to condo games.
tooltip_gamedata_info_message: The user appears in the database of a whitelist-gated condo game. Their presence required active participation, not merely joining.
tooltip_header_integration: This {0} has been flagged by a third-party content analysis system.
tooltip_header_mixed_group: This group contains a mix of appropriate and inappropriate members.
tooltip_header_mixed_user: This user has been linked to inappropriate content, but lacks sufficient evidence for Roblox action. They could also be a victim. Exercise caution.
tooltip_header_past_offender: This {0} had inappropriate content previously but their account currently appears clean.
tooltip_header_pending: This {0} has been flagged by our system with {1}% confidence.
tooltip_header_queued_processing: This {0} is currently being checked by our system. This may take a few minutes.
tooltip_header_queued_safe: This {0} has been reviewed by our system and does not have sufficient evidence to be flagged.
tooltip_header_safe: This {0} has not been reviewed yet.
tooltip_header_unsafe_auto: This {0} has been auto-confirmed by our system due to high severity.
tooltip_header_unsafe_pre: This {0} has been verified as inappropriate by
tooltip_listdata_info_message: The user was observed inside a whitelist-gated condo game of a specific genre. Entry required joining a group or entering an access code.
tooltip_matchmaking_info_message: The user registered on a Tinder-style matchmaking platform and linked their Roblox account as a way to be contacted. Given Roblox's large minor user base, soliciting dating-style connections through it is a serious child-safety concern.
tooltip_metadata_reprocess_title: This user's data is outdated. Click to requeue for analysis.
tooltip_monitor_info_message: The user was observed inside a condo game. Entry required joining a specific group or entering an access code, making accidental access unlikely.
tooltip_no_data_available: No data available for this API
tooltip_outfit_message: An outfit worn by this user was detected. Outfit detection can have false positives, so please use your own judgment.
tooltip_purchase_info_message: The user purchased a gamepass that grants access to a condo game.
tooltip_restricted_message: Your account has been flagged by Rotector and extension access has been revoked.
tooltip_reviewer_anonymous_message: This reviewer has chosen to keep their identity hidden. The review is still verified and legitimate.
tooltip_safe_reason_condo_groups: Community hub groups are treated differently from condo hosting groups. Groups that actively host inappropriate content are treated more aggressively than general community spaces.
tooltip_safe_reason_external: You may have information from outside Roblox (social media, community reports) that the automated system cannot access.
tooltip_safe_reason_outfit: If your concern is about outfits, the user may not have been queued for outfit review.
tooltip_safe_reason_profile_changed: The user's profile, friends, groups, or outfits may have changed before the review was completed.
tooltip_safe_reason_system_limits: No automated system catches everything. If you believe this was a genuine miss, {0}.
tooltip_safe_reason_threshold: The user may have some flagged friends or groups, but not enough to trigger a flag.
tooltip_safe_reason_throwaway_alt: The account may be a throwaway or alt that our system chose not to analyze to prevent abuse from mass queueing intended to waste system resources.
tooltip_trap3_info_message: Entry to this separately operated trap game required the user to generate and enter a unique access code tied to their Roblox account, confirming intentional access.
tooltip_trap_info_message: Entry requires a lengthy numerical access code that cannot be guessed and must be obtained from condo communities, indicating the user intentionally sought out inappropriate content.
tooltip_trapv2_info_message: The user's Roblox account was verified through third-party Discord services, meaning impersonation is impossible. They then explicitly agreed to a disclaimer acknowledging the game contains explicit sexual content and that they were accessing it of their own free will, before entering with a personal access code. Zero false positives.
voting_description: Help others by confirming if this user's status is accurate.
voting_description_confirmed: Confirmed as inappropriate. Disagree? File an appeal.
